candidates.why: Appears directly beneath the selected COGS bucket and above 'Cost of goods sold - Balancing value'; the values indicate it is a component of the selected 'Cost of goods sold' total rather than a separate same-level add-on.

variables.notes: Do not add separately. 'Depreciation in Cost of Revenues' appears embedded within the already selected parent row 'Cost of goods sold' because the balancing row plus depreciation approximately reconciles to the selected total.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Sits with the administration/SG&A section and appears to be a sub-component of the selected SG&A bucket, especially because 'Cost of administration - Balancing value' plus the depreciation rows approximately reconciles to 'Cost of administration'.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A-related depreciation, but it appears to be another component within the selected 'Cost of administration' total rather than a separate expense to add on top.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles
candidates.why: Could relate to SG&A/marketing/admin, but in context it looks like an operating sub-component within already selected overhead buckets, not a separate same-level D&A line to add separately.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit R&D D&A component, but the selected 'Cost of research and development' row is already included in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so adding this separately would risk distortion/double counting under the R&D interaction rule.
Explicit R&D depreciation component, but it appears embedded in the selected R&D expense row that is already handled through both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.

variables.notes: No separate XSGA_DA row should be added. SG&A depreciation rows appear to be components of the selected administration/overhead totals, and R&D-related D&A should not be added separately because 'Cost of research and development' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.
